collision energy: using a threshold energy of 27 for higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
fragmentation method: using a threshold energy of 27 for higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
instrument: a hybrid quadrupole orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q‐Exactive Plus Orbitrap, ThermoScientific).
ionization type: with a nano-flow electrospray ionization source.
